title: Standards and Testing Agency: annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "STA’s annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025 covers the financial year ended 31 March 2025.  STA, an executive agency of the Department for Education, develops and delivers assessments for children in education between reception and the end of key stage 2.  This report was laid before Parliament on 10 July 2025.  "
